arts.ttl: I saw Kevin De Bruyne's hurt at Man City contract decision as Txiki Begiristain listened
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne said he was shocked at Manchester City's decision not to renew his contract, relayed to him in a 'brief' meeting at the start of April.

arts.ttl: How Man Utd would line up with Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot and Patrick Dorgu have established themselves as Man Utd’s favoured wing-back pairing in recent weeks, while Manuel Ugarte and Kobbie Mainoo are arguably the two best central midfield options available to Amorim. Ruben Amorim has a number of centre-back options at his disposal, but Noussair Mazraoui, Harry Maguire and Lisandro Martinez may well be the most likely trio to start at the heart of Man Utd’s backline if everyone is fully fit.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane agrees with Ruben Amorim as Man Utd eye Marcus Rashford swap deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are eyeing up a summer swoop for Ollie Watkins, which could see Marcus Rashford head the other way, with Roy Keane among those to praise the Aston Villa striker

arts.ttl: 'Not the nicest' - Life at 17 in cut-throat Man City squad was tough but it transformed my football outlook
arts.sum: Life coming through the ranks at Manchester City is not easy, but the lessons learnt are vast.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ollie Watkins transfer offer as Ruben Amorim involved in fresh snub
arts.sum: Manchester United showed their full focus is now on the Europa League with a defeat to Wolves on Sunday, though boss Ruben Amorim is also looking towards the summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Manchester City transfer news latest: Pep Guardiola to 'step up' interest in Ederson successor after injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly decide to step up their interest in a potential successor to goalkeeper Ederson following an injury blow.

arts.ttl: Manchester United set for transfer battle with Manchester City for Ligue 1 winger 'wanted by Paris Saint-Germain'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim may have to fend off competition from Manchester City and Paris Saint-Germain for a Ligue 1 winger.

arts.ttl: Ian Maatsen makes 'exceptional' Aston Villa admission ahead of huge Man City clash
arts.sum: Ian Maatsen acknowledges that squad rotation at Aston Villa is to be expected given the team's "exceptional" quality, but he now feels more comfortable within Unai Emery’s system. Ian Maatsen scored his second goal of the season for Aston Villa in the 4-1 win over Newcastle on Saturday

arts.ttl: Ederson surprised to be ‘alone’ in Milan 6-yard box for Atalanta winner
arts.sum: Ederson admits he was surprised to find himself ‘alone’ scoring the Atalanta winner against Milan,...

arts.ttl: Serie A | Milan 0-1 Atalanta: Ederson ends Rossoneri ambition
arts.sum: Ederson finished off a wonderful Atalanta team move to give them victory at San Siro,...
